text:
Created attachment 253755
www/py-mov-cli-test

mov-cli-test provides a testing framework for the mov-cli, a command-line
interface tool for managing and manipulating video files. This includes
various test cases and examples to ensure the functionality
and reliability of the mov-cli tool.

https://github.com/mov-cli/mov-cli-test

This port does depend on other packages, i'll add them later.
